input.title: vLLM OOM when loading Llama 4 Scout on single A100
input.body: Getting CUDA OOM error when trying to load Llama 4 Scout 17B-16E on a single A100 80GB. The model has 109B total params (MoE) which requires ~218GB in BF16. Error: torch.cuda.OutOfMemoryError. Need to use tensor parallelism or quantization.

input.title: Add support for Qwen3-Coder model in benchmark orchestrator
input.body: The new Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B model was released with excellent tool-calling support. We should add it to the model matrix in run_orchestrator.sh for benchmarking. It uses a MoE architecture with only 3.3B active params.

input.title: cloud-init fails: dpkg lock held by unattended-upgrades
input.body: On fresh Ubuntu 24.04 VMs, cloud-init runcmd scripts fail because unattended-upgrades holds the dpkg lock. The setup scripts try apt-get install but get 'Could not get lock /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend'. Need to disable unattended-upgrades first and wait for locks.

input.title: Document terraform.tfvars.example with all required variables
input.body: New users don't know what variables to set in terraform.tfvars. We need a documented example file showing subscription_id, hf_token, vm_size, and other required vars with descriptions.

input.title: Benchmark results show 0 tokens/s for concurrent requests
input.body: When running benchmark_client.py with concurrency > 16, some requests return 0 tokens/s. The vLLM server logs show 'Request timed out'. This happens more with larger context lengths. System: 2x A100 80GB, vLLM 0.19.1.

input.title: Security: HF token exposed in cloud-init user-data
input.body: The HuggingFace token is injected via Terraform templatefile into cloud-init.yaml and ends up in the VM's user-data metadata. Anyone with VM metadata access can read it. Should use Azure Key Vault or instance metadata service instead.

input.title: How to run benchmarks on V100 GPUs?
input.body: I have access to 4x V100 16GB instead of A100. Can the benchmark orchestrator be adapted? I know AWQ doesn't work on V100 (cc 7.0) but GPTQ should. What VM size should I use in terraform.tfvars?

input.title: Reduce A100 VM cost with spot instances
input.body: At $7.34/hr the A100 VM is expensive for development. Azure spot instances can reduce cost by 60-90%. We should add a terraform variable for spot pricing with auto-eviction handling. Risk: spot VMs can be evicted with 30s notice.

input.title: setup/05-programming-languages.sh: Rust installed to /root only
input.body: The Rust installation uses default rustup which installs to /root/.cargo. Other users (like azureuser) can't access cargo or rustc. Need to install system-wide to /usr/local/rustup and /usr/local/cargo with proper PATH exports.

input.title: Add Gemma 4 multimodal benchmark with image inputs
input.body: Gemma 4 31B supports vision (image understanding). We should add benchmark test cases with image inputs to measure multimodal performance. The vLLM server already has --limit-mm-per-prompt configured for up to 4 images per request.
